highlights.text: My general lean is to defer to the trend.
This is how institutions long: They wait for an elevator down sell, wait for a low to be lost, trap shorts below the low, and we rally.
Last Tuesday at 9:40AM, we flushed 6701 (there was a big shelf of lows there set on Monday/early Tuesday) to 6675, trapped shorts then recovered 6701 for a Failed Breakdown.

This can fill out then next leg sees 6863, 6877, 6889 as the first slate of targets.” I also wrote: “The Failed Breakdown of the 11:30AM 6818 low is also actionable.” We got exactly this today - put in the 6818 Failed Breakdown at 9:25AM, filled out the flag, then rallied to 6863+.

In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into some of the quality Failed Breakdowns and Level Reclaim’s we’ve had in this 6805 to 6853 range since late last week - ranges like this are a goldmine for those who trade the traps as I do, since there are so many traps.
I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “ES is flagging 6853 to 6805 with a 6825-30 magnet in the middle.

post_title: SPX Makes A Weekly High - But Are All Time Highs Coming? Dec 4th Plan
